name: Gourmet Gift Basket
recipeIngredient: Pasta and sauce 2 cups pasta with tomato sauce
Infused olive oil 1/4 cup flavored olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place smoked cheese in a small bowl.
2. Arrange crackers on a tray for easy sharing.
3. Toss pasta dinner with cooked pasta noodles.
4. Slice marinated vegetables and arrange them alongside the pasta.
5. Add olives to the dish, distributing evenly.
6. Scatter candy pieces throughout the arrangement.
7. Place cookies in a separate container or serve with breads.
8. Mix Belgian brownie mix according to package instructions and bake.
9. Sprinkle capers over the top of the brownies before serving.
10. Drizzle garlic sauce generously over pasta and vegetables.
11. Gently fold gourmet spreads into the pasta dish for flavor infusion.
12. Add a splash of infused olive oil to enhance the overall taste.
13. Brew Italian coffee fresh and serve alongside as desired.
